perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female creator (Sui Sui) standing in front of a FamilyMart, gesturing excitedly and performing a signature dance move. (2) The scene shifts to a montage of interviews where the creator interacts with three different people (two women and one man) outside and inside the store, recording their reactions as they taste the new grass jelly flavored soft serve. (3) Close-up shots show the ice cream machine dispensing a swirl of brown soft serve into a purple branded cup and a cone. (4) The creator then presents a purple cup containing a taro milk smoothie, pointing at the text on the cup while smiling at the camera. (5) The final sequence features on-screen graphics showing promotional pricing and dates against a backdrop of the creator holding the products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music plays throughout. A female voice (Sui Sui) speaks in an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone, introducing the brand collaboration. (2) A distinctive melodic hook 'Xian-Xian-Xian-Xian-Cao' (Grass Jelly) is repeated several times during the video. (3) During the interview segments, ambient street noise and the chatter of the interviewees are audible, mixed with laughter and 'slurping' sound effects. (4) The creator's voiceover remains dominant, transitioning to a clear, promotional tone as she lists prices and dates near the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the dialogue of the creator and interviewees throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, stylized text overlays appear such as '水水灶咖 X Fami!ce' and '仙～仙～仙～仙草' (Grass Jelly) to emphasize the theme. (3) Promotional Text: Detailed graphics list prices like '5隻只要188元' (5 for 188 yuan), dates like '7/5 - 7/7', and offers like '買一送一' (Buy one get one free).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Street Interviews/Tasting -> Product Close-ups -> Promotional Details -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 3 interviewees (2 female, 1 male), and 2 female store staff visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a white floral sleeveless top and light blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between the storefront of a FamilyMart with glass doors and advertisements, and the interior showing product shelves and the ice cream counter.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight mixed with bright indoor fluorescent store lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature 1 (Soft Serve) -> Social Proof (Interviews) -> Product Feature 2 (Smoothie) -> Promotional Details
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to drive sales and awareness for a limited-time collaboration between the influencer brand 'Sui Sui Kitchen' and 'FamilyMart Taiwan'. It uses a street-interview format to provide social proof of the product's taste (grass jelly soft serve and taro milk smoothie) while clearly outlining multiple promotional discounts to incentivize immediate purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features brand logos prominently, specific product close-ups, pricing information, and the creator specifically naming the collaboration brands.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses a specific rhythmic chant 'Xian-Xian-Xian-Xian-Cao' and a signature pose at the beginning.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The high editing density and frequent use of variety-show style text overlays are characteristic of Taiwanese social media marketing (Reels/TikTok style) targeting a younger demographic.
